context: Tests whether the agent builds a revenue analytics API endpoint following the skill's specific SQL patterns, caching strategy, granularity validation, and financial metric separation. Covers DATE_TRUNC usage, cancelled order filtering, NULLIF for division safety, Redis caching TTL, granularity validation, GMV/net revenue separation, and period-over-period comparison.

checklist.name: DATE_TRUNC aggregation
checklist.description: SQL query uses DATE_TRUNC (not DATE() or EXTRACT) for time period aggregation

checklist.name: Cancelled order filter
checklist.description: SQL query includes a filter that excludes cancelled orders (e.g. WHERE status NOT IN ('cancelled') or equivalent)

checklist.name: NULLIF for AOV
checklist.description: AOV calculation uses NULLIF around the order count denominator to prevent division by zero (e.g. NULLIF(COUNT(...), 0))

checklist.name: Cents to decimal conversion
checklist.description: Monetary values from cents columns are divided by 100.0 (not 100) in SQL or TypeScript before being returned

checklist.name: Redis caching
checklist.description: Handler checks a Redis cache before querying the database and stores the result back in Redis after querying

checklist.name: Cache TTL range
checklist.description: Redis TTL is set between 300 and 900 seconds (5–15 minutes) when storing the cached result

checklist.name: Granularity validation
checklist.description: Handler validates the granularity parameter and returns a 400 error response when an unsupported value is provided

checklist.name: Valid granularity values
checklist.description: The set of accepted granularity values includes all four of: 'hour', 'day', 'week', 'month'

checklist.name: GMV and net revenue separated
checklist.description: The response includes both a gross revenue (or GMV) field AND a separate net revenue field (gross minus discounts, at minimum)

checklist.name: Period-over-period comparison
checklist.description: The handler or design doc computes and returns metrics for both the requested period and a prior period of the same length

checklist.name: Concurrent period queries
checklist.description: When fetching current and prior period data, Promise.all (or equivalent concurrent fetch) is used rather than sequential awaits
